hero.verse: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.

mission.label: Mission Statement
mission.description: To comprehend transformed society by the gospel of Jesus Christ, growing up skilled, healthy and productive and get out of poverty, committed to change and development.

connect.title: Get Connected
connect.description: Explore our ministries and discover meaningful ways to grow, and serve the kingdom of God.

more.title: Looking For More Ministries?
more.description: Discover new ways to connect with our faith community, grow spiritually, and make a meaningful impact in service.
more.worship_desc: Leading the church in praise, worship, and music ministry.
more.diakon_desc: Serving with care, hospitality, and practical support.
more.media_desc: Sharing the message through media, design, and communications.

schedule.title: Weekly Schedule
schedule.description: Plan your week and join the ministries that fit your season and calling.
schedule.no_schedule: There are no weekly schedules set.

happenings.label: LATEST HAPPENINGS
happenings.title: Upcoming Events
happenings.app_desc: Stay connected with our community. Get the latest updates and join us from anywhere.
happenings.prayer_desc: Join us for prayer, worship, and community connection every Wednesday at 7:00 PM.
happenings.service_desc: Join us on Sunday at 9:00 AM or 10:30 AM for worship, community, and spiritual growth.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Who We Are
about.description: We are a church family committed to worship, discipleship, and serving our community. Our mission is to share the gospel of Jesus Christ and grow together in faith, love, and service.

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out for prayer requests, questions, or ways to connect.

media.label: WATCH & LISTEN
media.title: Latest Media
media.description: Worship, teaching, sermons, and more media to help you grow.

give.label: GIVE
give.title: Give
give.description: Your generosity helps us serve, care, and reach more people.
give.prompt: Choose a giving option from the menu above.

resources.label: RESOURCES
resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Helpful materials, guides, and downloads for your walk of faith.
resources.body: We are preparing resources that will be available here soon.

registrations.label: REGISTRATIONS
registrations.title: Registrations
registrations.home_church_desc: Register for a home church group and get connected.
registrations.membership_form_desc: Complete the membership form to join the church family.
registrations.choose_ministry_desc: Select a ministry area where you want to serve.
registrations.page_description: Complete the form below and we will follow up with you.

footer.about_title: Ethiopian Full Gospel Believers Church Bole Local church
footer.about_desc: Growing together in faith, love, and service
